title: Oh, My Love
content:
Oh, my love
If you were at the level of my madness,
You would cast away your jewelry,
Sell all your bracelets,
And sleep in my eyes.
meaning:
"Oh, My Love" is a quintessential example of Nizar Qabbani's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
